title: DISCOVERY - 211info
text: EMERGENCE EUGENE DISCOVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF This DUII Diversion program can provide assistance to those seeking: Oregon DMV certificates Occupational Driver's license Resolution of Court requirements Fulfillment of DUII and DMV requirements Also: MIP referrals 78 Centennial Loop Suite A Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Individuals who are seeking a solution for required treatment for DUII diversion, resolution of old DUII for driving privileges or MIP. Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 393-0777 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 393-0777 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service. OHP, sliding scale, insurance, limited free slots. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Cities of Eugene and Springfield SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: 2 blocks from LTD bus stop on MLK Jr Boulevard Services: Diversion Programs DUI Offender Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - THRESHOLD INTENSIVE OUTPATIENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EMERGENCE EUGENE
